prompt: Our NetSuite go-live is this Friday for a mid-size retail company. We've completed UAT and training. Walk me through what needs to happen between now and Monday morning.

assertions.text: The response includes a chronological cutover timeline from Friday to Monday.
The response mentions data migration or final data loads (e.g., trial balances, open AR/AP).
The response addresses user access and system lockdown (blackout period).
The response includes post-go-live support or 'war room' details.
